title: Cry, the Beloved Country
actors: Canada Lee, Sidney Poitier, Charles Carson
plot: Stephen Kumalo journeys to Johannesburg to search for his missing son, only to find his people living in squalor and his son a criminal. A South African clergyman helps find his missing son-turned-thief and sister-turned-prostitute.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 3 nominations total
